commands.review_summary:
Adds a `scripts/docker/setup.sh --offline` mode, Docker install docs, and Docker setup e2e coverage for preloaded-image reruns.

PR surface: Tests +107, Docs +21, Other +32. Total +160 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows the setup script always builds `openclaw:local` or pulls `OPENCLAW_IMAGE` before the rerun steps, and no `--offline` parser or documented airgapped rerun path exists.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Wait for contributor or maintainer real Docker/offline rerun proof; there is no narrow code repair for automation to make from this review.

target.title: feat(docker): support offline setup reruns
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `scripts/docker/setup.sh --offline` for airgapped reruns with a preloaded `OPENCLAW_IMAGE`.
- Skip Docker build/pull in offline mode, but still run the normal setup flow: `.env` sync, permission fix, onboarding/config sync, and Compose startup.
- Verify the main image with `docker image inspect`; warn, not fail, when the optional sandbox image is missing.
- Document the offline rerun flow and add Docker setup e2e coverage.

Fixes #70443

## Proof

```
git config user.name && git config user.email
```

```
Alix-007
li.long15@xydigit.com
```

```
git log -1 --format='%H%n%an <%ae>%n%s'
```

```
9f3ab77974bbfb89e78abb8ce2f8abef1ecac3c3
Alix-007 <li.long15@xydigit.com>
feat(docker): support offline setup reruns
```

```
bash -n scripts/docker/setup.sh
```

```
(no output; exit 0)
```

```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/docker-setup.e2e.test.ts
```

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  37 passed (37)
   Duration  7.12s
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 8.34s
```

```
pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/docker-setup.e2e.test.ts
```

```
All matched files use the correct format.
```

```
pnpm exec oxlint src/docker-setup.e2e.test.ts
```

```
(no output; exit 0)
```

```
git diff --check && pnpm docs:list | rg 'install/docker|Docker'
```

```
install/docker.md - Optional Docker-based setup and onboarding for OpenClaw
  Read when: You want a containerized gateway instead of local installs; You are validating the Docker flow
```

## Source-level offline behavior proof

```
tmp=$(mktemp -d) && mkdir -p "$tmp/scripts/docker" "$tmp/scripts/lib" "$tmp/bin" "$tmp/config" "$tmp/workspace" "$tmp/auth" && cp scripts/docker/setup.sh "$tmp/scripts/docker/setup.sh" && cp scripts/lib/docker-build.sh scripts/lib/docker-e2e-logs.sh scripts/lib/docker-e2e-container.sh "$tmp/scripts/lib/" && cp Dockerfile "$tmp/Dockerfile" && printf 'services:\n  openclaw-gateway:\n    image: noop\n  openclaw-cli:\n    image: noop\n' > "$tmp/docker-compose.yml" && cat > "$tmp/bin/docker" <<'STUB'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
log="$DOCKER_STUB_LOG"
if [[ "${1:-}" == "compose" && "${2:-}" == "version" ]]; then exit 0; fi
if [[ "${1:-}" == "image" && "${2:-}" == "inspect" ]]; then echo "image inspect ${3:-}" >>"$log"; exit 0; fi
if [[ "${1:-}" == "pull" ]]; then echo "pull $*" >>"$log"; exit 0; fi
if [[ "${1:-}" == "build" ]]; then echo "build $*" >>"$log"; exit 0; fi
if [[ "${1:-}" == "compose" ]]; then echo "compose $*" >>"$log"; exit 0; fi
echo "unknown $*" >>"$log"; exit 0
STUB
cat > "$tmp/bin/timeout" <<'STUB'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
if [[ "${1:-}" == --kill-after=* ]]; then shift; elif [[ "${1:-}" == "--kill-after" ]]; then shift 2; fi
if [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; then shift; fi
exec "$@"
STUB
chmod +x "$tmp/bin/docker" "$tmp/bin/timeout" "$tmp/scripts/docker/setup.sh" && : > "$tmp/docker-stub.log" && PATH="$tmp/bin:$PATH" DOCKER_STUB_LOG="$tmp/docker-stub.log" OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN=test-token OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR="$tmp/config" OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR="$tmp/workspace" OPENCLAW_AUTH_PROFILE_SECRET_DIR="$tmp/auth" OPENCLAW_IMAGE='ghcr.io/openclaw/openclaw:latest' OPENCLAW_SKIP_ONBOARDING=1 bash "$tmp/scripts/docker/setup.sh" --offline >"$tmp/stdout" 2>"$tmp/stderr"; status=$?; echo STATUS=$status; echo '--- stdout'; sed -n '1,80p' "$tmp/stdout"; echo '--- stderr'; sed -n '1,80p' "$tmp/stderr"; echo '--- docker log'; sed -n '1,120p' "$tmp/docker-stub.log"
```

```
STATUS=0
--- stdout
==> Using preloaded Docker image: ghcr.io/openclaw/openclaw:latest

==> Fixing data-directory permissions

==> Skipping onboarding (OPENCLAW_SKIP_ONBOARDING is set)

==> Docker gateway defaults
Pinned gateway.mode=local and gateway.bind=lan for Docker setup.
Set gateway.controlUi.allowedOrigins to ["http://localhost:18789","http://127.0.0.1:18789"] for non-loopback bind.

==> Starting gateway

--- stderr
--- docker log
image inspect ghcr.io/openclaw/openclaw:latest
compose compose -f .../docker-compose.yml run --rm --no-deps --user root --entrypoint sh openclaw-gateway -c find /home/node/.openclaw -xdev -exec chown node:node {} +; ...
compose compose -f .../docker-compose.yml run --rm --no-deps -e HOME=/home/node ... --entrypoint node openclaw-gateway dist/index.js config set --batch-json [{"path":"gateway.mode","value":"local"},{"path":"gateway.bind","value":"lan"},{"path":"gateway.controlUi.allowedOrigins","value":["http://localhost:18789","http://127.0.0.1:18789"]}]
compose compose -f .../docker-compose.yml up -d openclaw-gateway
```

There are no `build` or `pull` log entries in the offline proof, while the downstream setup steps still run.

## Not run

```
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --label docker-setup-offline-check --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

```
[crabbox] bin=crabbox version=unknown provider=azure providers=unknown
[crabbox] selected binary failed basic --version/--help sanity checks
```

The local `crabbox` binary is not usable in this checkout, so I could not run the wrapped changed-check.
